description: Royalty-free music library for Xalq Insurance Digital OS Video Studio. render.py reads this when an edit spec asks for music.track = "auto": it filters tracks by the requested mood tag and picks one. Add an entry for every file you drop into music/. The audio files themselves are git-ignored - only this manifest is tracked.

_entry_format.file: filename of the audio in music/ (mp3/wav/m4a)
_entry_format.title: human-readable track name
moods: one or more tags from mood_tags
_entry_format.license: license terms - keep proof you may use it commercially
